plugins.locationAlwaysAndWhenInUsePermission: Papzi uses your location to find nearby photographers and show them on a map.

plugins.photosPermission: Papzi needs access to your photos so you can upload images to your portfolio and social feed.
plugins.cameraPermission: Papzi needs camera access so you can take photos for your portfolio and social feed.

infoPlist.NSLocationWhenInUseUsageDescription: Papzi uses your location to show nearby photographers on the map.
infoPlist.NSLocationAlwaysUsageDescription: Papzi uses your location in the background to provide live booking tracking.
infoPlist.NSPhotoLibraryUsageDescription: Papzi needs access to your photo library so you can upload images to your portfolio and social feed.
infoPlist.NSCameraUsageDescription: Papzi needs camera access so you can take photos for your portfolio and social feed.
infoPlist.NSPhotoLibraryAddUsageDescription: Papzi saves edited photos to your library.
